transcript: I always speed up through the bicycle tunnel under Centraal at night. The lighting flickers and there are usually a couple of guys hanging around the bend where you can't see what's coming.
summary: Bicycle tunnel under Centraal felt unsafe at night

transcript: Cycling out of the IJ-side tunnel around midnight, a man whistled and tried to grab my handlebar. I didn't stop. Heart pounded the whole way home.
summary: Man tried to grab a cyclist's handlebar leaving Centraal tunnel

transcript: Tunnel near Centraal is fine in rush hour but after 11pm it smells like piss and there are no cameras working. I avoid it now.
summary: Centraal bike tunnel feels neglected and unsafe after 11pm

transcript: Walking from the Sloterdijk platforms down to the bus stop, the underpass was completely empty and one of the lights was broken. A man was just standing in the corner staring.
summary: Man loitered in a broken-lit Sloterdijk underpass

transcript: Sloterdijk passage is genuinely scary at night. Long, narrow, no exits. I sprint through it.
summary: Sloterdijk passage felt long, narrow and exposed

transcript: Group of guys catcalling everyone walking off the train at Sloterdijk last night. Staff didn't intervene.
summary: Group catcalled commuters leaving Sloterdijk station

transcript: Bijlmer ArenA exit at 1am: the escalators were off, half the lights flicker. Someone followed me down the stairs and only stopped when I went into the AH To Go.
summary: Followed down the stairs at Bijlmer ArenA exit

transcript: Bijlmer station area is so badly lit. The square between the metro and the parking is dead empty after 10pm.
summary: Bijlmer station square felt dead and badly lit after 10pm

transcript: Two guys aggressively tried to sell me something near Bijlmer station, blocked my path until a tram pulled in.
summary: Two men blocked a woman's path near Bijlmer station

transcript: Damrak after the bars close is just a corridor of drunk guys yelling. Felt like I was being assessed every few steps.
summary: Damrak after closing felt like a gauntlet of drunk men

transcript: A guy grabbed my arm on Damrak around 3am. He let go when I shouted but no one nearby reacted.
summary: Stranger grabbed a woman's arm on Damrak at 3am

transcript: Damrak is fine but the side alleys off it are pitch black. I always stick to the tram side.
summary: Side alleys off Damrak felt pitch black at night

transcript: Walked down Spuistraat after a late shift and a man followed me from the corner of Raadhuisstraat almost to my door. Pretended to make a phone call until he turned off.
summary: Followed by a man on Spuistraat for several blocks

transcript: Spuistraat at night is too quiet, only the bars at the south end have any life. The middle stretch always feels off.
summary: Middle stretch of Spuistraat felt too quiet at night

transcript: Two men fighting outside a bar on Spuistraat, glass everywhere. I crossed to the other side.
summary: Fight broke out outside a bar on Spuistraat

transcript: Reguliersbreestraat between the cinema and Rembrandtplein is rough on weekends. Shoved twice in five minutes by drunk groups.
summary: Reguliersbreestraat felt aggressive and crowded on weekend nights

transcript: A guy on Reguliersbreestraat exposed himself to me near the corner. Walked off laughing when I yelled.
summary: Man indecently exposed himself on Reguliersbreestraat

transcript: The smoke shops on Reguliersbreestraat get a lot of weird foot traffic late. I don't make eye contact.
summary: Late-night foot traffic on Reguliersbreestraat felt sketchy

transcript: Walking across Nieuwmarkt at 2am, three men started following me asking where I lived. Ducked into a hotel lobby.
summary: Three men asked where she lived and followed her at Nieuwmarkt

transcript: Nieuwmarkt itself is fine but the alleys to Zeedijk are not. Always a few guys in dark hoodies who watch you pass.
summary: Alleys from Nieuwmarkt to Zeedijk felt watched at night

transcript: A man relieved himself in plain sight by the De Waag and then started shouting at women crossing the square.
summary: Man harassed women near De Waag at Nieuwmarkt

transcript: The north entrance of Westerpark by the railway is unlit and feels really cut off. I walk the long way around now.
summary: Westerpark north entrance felt unlit and cut off

transcript: A man jumped out from behind the bushes at Westerpark north and laughed when I screamed. He didn't follow but I haven't gone back.
summary: Man jumped from bushes at Westerpark north entrance

transcript: Westerpark north has good intentions, terrible execution. Half the path lights are out.
summary: Westerpark north path lights mostly out

transcript: South side of Zuidas after office hours is empty in a way that doesn't feel safe — long sightlines but no one to call to.
summary: Zuidas south flank felt empty and isolating after hours

transcript: A man on a scooter circled me twice on the Zuidas pedestrian path before riding off. Didn't say anything, just stared.
summary: Man on a scooter circled a pedestrian on Zuidas

transcript: All the glass towers and no eyes on the street — Zuidas at 11pm could be a different city.
summary: Zuidas felt deserted with no eyes on the street

transcript: Cycling home through the Westhaven, no one around for kilometers, only trucks. A car slowed beside me until I turned into a side street.
summary: Car slowed alongside a cyclist in Westhaven

transcript: Westhaven is just an industrial wasteland at night. Streetlights every 200 meters, no shops, nothing.
summary: Westhaven felt like an industrial wasteland at night

transcript: Saw a group of men loading something into a van in Westhaven; they stopped and watched until I cycled past.
summary: Men in Westhaven stopped loading a van to watch a passing cyclist

transcript: The little canal stretch between Brouwersgracht and Bloemgracht in the Jordaan is gorgeous in daylight, eerie at 1am. No bars, no foot traffic.
summary: Quiet Jordaan canals felt eerie after midnight

transcript: A man stepped out from a doorway on a Jordaan canal and asked for a cigarette, then walked behind me for a block.
summary: Man asked for a cigarette and trailed a woman in the Jordaan

transcript: The narrow bridges in the Jordaan have no railings, no lights. If anything happened there'd be no way out.
summary: Narrow Jordaan bridges have no lights or escape route

transcript: The south entrance of Vondelpark by the Amstelveenseweg is so dark — the trees block all the streetlight.
summary: Vondelpark south entrance felt dark under tree cover

transcript: Jogger ran past me in the south end of Vondelpark, then doubled back. Ran with me for a minute before turning off.
summary: Jogger doubled back and followed a woman in Vondelpark south

transcript: Vondelpark south is fine in summer but in November the path is pitch black. I cycle on the road around it.
summary: Vondelpark south path goes pitch black in winter

transcript: Oosterpark, west gate, after 11pm: a man followed me along the inside of the fence until I left through the next gate.
summary: Man followed a woman along Oosterpark fence after 11pm

transcript: Lights in the southern half of Oosterpark have been out for weeks. Reported it twice to the gemeente, nothing.
summary: Oosterpark south lights out for weeks despite reports

transcript: Heard yelling and what sounded like a fight near the Oosterpark playground around 10pm. Police drove past slow but didn't stop.
summary: Yelling and possible fight near Oosterpark playground

transcript: Brouwersgracht underpass near the railway is one of those spots that looks fine on Google Maps but in person feels claustrophobic.
summary: Brouwersgracht railway underpass felt claustrophobic

transcript: Underpass at Singel near the Torensluis: a man was waiting at the far end, just watching. Turned and went around the long way.
summary: Man stood watching at the Singel underpass exit

transcript: Cycled under Herengracht bridge at 2am and someone whistled from the dark side. No one was visible. Kept moving.
summary: Whistling from the dark under a Herengracht bridge

transcript: Centraal east tunnel exit had two men loitering near the bike racks. Made a show of locking my bike fast and got out.
summary: Men loitering at Centraal east tunnel bike racks

transcript: Bijlmer parking garage stairwell smells like urine and the door to the lower level didn't close. Ran up.
summary: Bijlmer parking garage stairwell broken and unsafe
